arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund predicted XI vs Mainz 05: Nuri Şahin to avoid risk taking
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will continue to be without several key players as they look to win successive games in the Bundesliga heading into the international break. Ahead of today’s game against…

arts.ttl: Liverpool disadvantaged in two-way race to sign Dortmund star as Barcelona prepare swap offer
arts.sum: Liverpool have been dealt a potential blow in pursuit of Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi. The Reds have been linked with the 22-year-old for quite some time with speculation they could approach Dortmund over a deal in the summer. However, Arne Slot’s chances of signing the rapid wide-forward have been dented after Barcelona joined the running. […] The post Liverpool disadvantaged in two-way race to sign Dortmund star as Barcelona prepare swap offer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Dortmund unhappy with tight Bundesliga schedule: "Difficult for us to accept"
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have been left frustrated by the recently announced Bundesliga fixture list.

arts.ttl: Mainz vs Borussia Dortmund preview: Schwarzgelben chase third straight win
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund manager Nuri Sahin aims for his team to secure a third straight victory as they head to Mewa Arena this Saturday to face Mainz 05 in their 10th Bundesliga match of the season.

arts.ttl: Sahin gives injury update on depleted Dortmund squad
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund coach Nuri Sahin has given an update on his injury-hit squad ahead of this weekend's trip to Mainz.
Week 10 of the Bundesliga promises to serve up plenty of entertainment and Tom McGarry has provided a score prediction for each of the nine games.

arts.ttl: Preview: Mainz 05 vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Mainz 05 and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues make £42m Dortmund star priority target for 2025?
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi emerges as Chelsea's number one transfer target for the summer of 2025, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Dortmund Travel to Mainz With Terrible Away Form
arts.sum: If Borussia Dortmund want to get their first away win, they’ll have to beat Zentner. The other and more alarming fact is that Borussia Dortmund have been dreadful away from home.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Dortmund Outlast Sturm Graz to Win 1-0 in the Champions League
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund continued their fantastic run of form (winning any games at all) with a 1-0 win against Sturm Graz in the Champions League on Tuesday. It didn’t come easy, but a late Donyell Malen goal got the job done at Westfalenstadion, keeping BVB in the running for automatic qualification for the Round of 16.
